title: biscutella laevigata subsp. lucida
intro: Biscutella laevigata subsp. lucida, also known as the shiny chervil, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. The shiny chervil is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of shiny chervil include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat various conditions.
